# Undead's Gross Bow
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Undead%27s%20Gross%20Bow&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = Undead's Gross Bow
| slot = bow
| tier = UT
| rarity = l
| desc = A gross,rather large bow that was crafted from the dead. Thanks to: BeeEasy.

| rof = 85
| range = 7.04
| projSpeed = 16
| lifetime = 440
| minDmg = 85
| maxDmg = 120
| amplitude = 0.15
| frequency = 1
| shots = 5
| arcgap = 5
| feedp = 900
| fameb = 6

| effects = yes
| multihit = yes
| pierce = yes

| legendary = 4

| lootbag = white
|dropsFrom = drops from Troll Matriarch , Ghost Bride , Grave Caretaker , Ghost of Skuld}}
<noinclude>
[[Category:Bows]]

</noinclude>
